slice_criteria.note: Consensus-domain slice (D1): every dataset row whose `label` is one of the three consensus-specs areas the current 25-theorem FFG target set maps to (theorem_map.json labels). The slice is unfiltered beyond the label so the in-domain denominator derivation stays reproducible from vendored data; the structural in-domain filter itself lives in src/speca_lean4/recall.py and is reported per row.

columns_dropped_reason: pre_fix_code/post_fix_code/description and scoring columns are dropped to keep the vendored slice small and reviewable; the full rows live in the source dataset at the pinned revision.
